mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audit_plan(plan_type, plan_year, batch, plan_name, file_url, status, create_time) VALUES (#{planType}, #{planYear}, #{batch}, #{planName}, #{fileUrl}, 0, now())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM audit_plan WHERE id IN #{id}
DELETE FROM audit_unit WHERE id IN #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audit_leader(name, unit_id, position, tenure_start, tenure_end, create_time) VALUES (#{name},#{unitId},#{position},#{tenureStart}::date,#{tenureEnd}::date,now())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM audit_leader WHERE id IN #{id}
mapper.select: WITH progress_metrics AS ( SELECT p.id, count(DISTINCT m.id) AS material_total, count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN m.submit_status = 1 THEN m.id END) AS material_done, count(DISTINCT w.id) AS workpaper_total, count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN w.status >= 2 THEN w.id END) AS workpaper_done, count(DISTINCT i.id) AS issue_total, count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN r.status = 2 THEN i.id END) AS rect_done, max(CASE WHEN s.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scheme_approved, max(COALESCE(rep.status, -1)) AS report_status FROM audit_project p LEFT JOIN audit_material_checklist m ON m.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN audit_workpaper w ON w.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN audit_issue i ON i.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN audit_rectification r ON r.issue_id = i.id LEFT JOIN audit_scheme s ON s.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN audit_report rep ON rep.project_id = p.id GROUP BY p.id ) SELECT p.id,p.project_name,p.audited_unit,p.dept_id,p.audit_type,p.audit_year,p.status, COALESCE(p.start_date, make_date(p.audit_year, 1, 1)) AS start_date, COALESCE(p.end_date, make_date(p.audit_year, 12, 31)) AS end_date, CASE WHEN p.status = 2 THEN 100 WHEN p.status = 0 AND COALESCE(p.start_date, make_date(p.audit_year, 1, 1)) > CURRENT_DATE THEN 0 ELSE LEAST(99, ROUND( 10 + CASE WHEN pm.scheme_approved = 1 THEN 15 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN pm.material_total > 0 THEN 20.0 * pm.material_done / pm.material_total ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN pm.workpaper_total > 0 THEN 25.0 * pm.workpaper_done / pm.workpaper_total ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN pm.issue_total > 0 THEN 20.0 * pm.rect_done / pm.issue_total ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN pm.report_status = 2 THEN 10 WHEN pm.report_status = 1 THEN 7 WHEN pm.report_status = 0 THEN 4 ELSE 0 END ))::int END AS progress, CASE WHEN p.status = 2 THEN '归档' WHEN pm.issue_total > 0 AND pm.rect_done < pm.issue_total THEN '整改跟踪' WHEN pm.report_status >= 1 THEN '报告审核' WHEN pm.report_status = 0 THEN '报告编制' WHEN pm.workpaper_total > 0 AND pm.workpaper_done < pm.workpaper_total THEN '底稿复核' WHEN pm.workpaper_total > 0 THEN '现场实施' WHEN pm.material_total > 0 AND pm.material_done < pm.material_total THEN '资料收集' WHEN pm.scheme_approved = 1 THEN '审计准备' ELSE '准备' END AS phase, CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.is_overdue, 0) = 1 THEN 1 WHEN p.status <> 2 AND COALESCE(p.end_date, make_date(p.audit_year, 12, 31)) < CURRENT_DATE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_overdue, (SELECT count(*) FROM audit_issue WHERE project_id=p.id) AS issue_count, (SELECT count(*) FROM audit_issue i JOIN audit_rectification r ON r.issue_id=i.id WHERE i.project_id=p.id AND r.status=2) AS rect_count, pm.scheme_approved, pm.material_done, pm.material_total, pm.workpaper_done, pm.workpaper_total, pm.rect_done, pm.issue_total, pm.report_status FROM audit_project p JOIN progress_metrics pm ON pm.id = p.id ORDER BY p.audit_year DESC, p.status ASC

SELECT u.id,u.unit_name,u.unit_type,u.history_audit FROM audit_unit u WHERE u.id NOT IN ( SELECT u2.id FROM audit_unit u2 JOIN audit_project p ON p.dept_id = u2.dept_id OR (p.dept_id IS NULL AND p.audited_unit = u2.unit_name) WHERE p.audit_year >= EXTRACT(YEAR FROM now()) - 1 ) ORDER BY u.unit_name

SELECT l.id,l.name,l.position,l.tenure_end,u.unit_name FROM audit_leader l JOIN audit_unit u ON u.id = l.unit_id WHERE l.tenure_end IS NOT NULL AND l.tenure_end::date <= (CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '6 month')::date AND l.tenure_end::date >= CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY l.tenure_end ASC
SELECT id,name,position,to_char(tenure_start,'YYYY-MM-DD') tenure_start, to_char(tenure_end,'YYYY-MM-DD') tenure_end FROM audit_leader WHERE unit_id=#{unitId} ORDER BY tenure_start DESC

SELECT id,project_name,audit_type,audit_year,status FROM audit_project WHERE dept_id = (SELECT dept_id FROM audit_unit WHERE id=#{unitId}) OR (dept_id IS NULL AND audited_unit = (SELECT unit_name FROM audit_unit WHERE id=#{unitId})) ORDER BY audit_year DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audit_plan_project(plan_id, project_id) VALUES(#{planId}, #{projectId}) ON CONFLICT (plan_id, project_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM audit_plan_project WHERE plan_id=#{planId} AND project_id=#{projectId}
mapper.select: SELECT pp.project_id, p.project_name, p.audited_unit, p.dept_id, p.audit_type, p.audit_year, p.status, pp.bind_time FROM audit_plan_project pp JOIN audit_project p ON p.id=pp.project_id WHERE pp.plan_id=#{planId} ORDER BY pp.bind_time DESC
SELECT s.*, p.project_name FROM audit_scheme s LEFT JOIN audit_project p ON p.id=s.project_id WHERE s.plan_id=#{planId} ORDER BY s.create_time DESC
